narrative:
Barnesville Ex Vill Sd (Belmont) exempted village school district has 4,876 registered voters, with 59.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.3%, a clear Republican lean of 6.3 percentage points.
